final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input [7:0] setpoint,  
    input [7:0] current_output,  
    output reg [7:0] control_signal  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        control_signal <= setpoint - current_output;  
    end  
endmodule
